name: PT Kirana Megatara Tbk
summary: PT Kirana Megatara Tbk, together with its subsidiaries, produces crumb rubber in Indonesia. The company produces SIR 10, SIR 20, and SIR 20 CV type crumb rubber. Its SIR products are exported to tire manufacturers worldwide. The company was founded in 1964 and is headquartered in South Jakarta, Indonesia. PT Kirana Megatara Tbk operates as a subsidiary of HSF (S) Pte. Ltd.
